creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
For me it seems that spamassassin has problems with pre-install script. And that's why amavisd-new or spamass-rules cannot install. You can check it:

http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-default/2017-10-16_02h07m28s/logs/errors/amavisd-new-2.11.0_2,1.log

http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-default/2017-10-16_02h07m28s/logs/errors/spamass-rules-20140707.log

So spamassassin port should be checked.
